raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I booked a hotel room through XXXX at The XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX in XXXX with check-in on XX/XX/XXXX and check out XX/XX/XXXX. The amount of the purchase was {$150.00}. According to XXXX, there would be, " No additional room charges or fees, '' and that the, " Room cost [ was ] paid in advance. '' On XX/XX/XXXX, I learned from a friend that booked the same hotel with an earlier check-in date through XXXX that the hotel was imposing additional fees. 

Also on XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted the hotel to confirm if the room was fully paid for or if there would be additional fees. I called the hotel and they told me that there was still an outstanding " guest benefit package '' and " reservation processing fee '' of {$290.00}. This is in contrast from the information I received when I booked on XXXX. XXXX said there were no additional fees. I let the hotel know I was cancelling and followed their advice to reach out to XXXX via email to let them know I would be cancelling and would like a full refund. 

XXXX never replied, so I initiated a dispute with the credit card company I used to make the purchase, Citi. Citi received my dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi made the determination that I was responsible for the charge. I contacted Citi again on XX/XX/XXXX to request reconsideration and provide documentation. I also provided the recorded call with the hotel on XX/XX/XXXX to Citi. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi again decided I was responsible for the charge.
